_comment: TEMPLATE eval cases — clearly SYNTHETIC, no real AAA customer data. They exist only to prove the harness end-to-end. Replace/extend with the real, human-graded, anonymized 50-100 cases per docs/LLM-ARCHITECTURE.md (see the owner checklist in the Slice 1 report). Each case is owned by AAA; piiCleared must be true before status can be 'active'.

input.task: Estimate carpet install for 14 stairs + 1 landing, standard pad

reference.note: Synthetic reference price for harness demonstration only

input.message: Hi, how can I get into the house if no one is home?
Thank you for choosing us! A quick review would mean a lot.

reference.note: Should invite a review without over-promising.

cases.notes: contains: text must mention 'review', must not over-promise.

reference.note: Must be a JSON object with recommendation + numeric confidence.

cases.notes: json_schema: candidate object must have recommendation:string + confidence:number.
